base.redeployNote: P4.1 + P4.2 BROADCAST (2026-07-06). P4.1: PrivacyPool rewritten to per-denom Poseidon trees + global spent set; constructor (address verifier, uint256[] initialDenominations). Single-denom back-compat achieved by seeding [100000000000000000] (0.1 ETH) - pool owner may call addDenomination(d) post-deploy to enable other face values. P4.2: NEW AerodromePrivacyWrapper deployed via one-off script/DeployAerodrome.s.sol (broadcast-only-no-redeploy-all) for Base's primary DEX; the first broadcast used a 3-field Route struct (missing factory) which mis-aligned ABI encoding against Aerodrome's actual 4-field Route struct, causing every real swap to revert inside Aerodrome Router with empty error data. P4.2 hotfix: redeployed with 5-arg constructor that takes Aerodrome PoolFactory (volatile + stable) as immutables and adds a public route(from, to, stable) helper. Previous wrapper at 0x009681CdF5441D23738EC6597e586eBB06215e3D remains on-chain but is no longer the canonical address (superseded). costs: P4.1 ~0.000033 ETH (5 contracts); P4.2 v1 ~0.000004 ETH; P4.2 v2 (hotfix) ~0.000012 ETH. Forge vm.writeJson quirk persists only chainId; this manifest was hand-enriched post-broadcast from contracts/broadcast/{Deploy,DeployAerodrome}.s.sol/8453/run-latest.json. NativePrivateSwap LIVE on Base (2026-07-06): in-house swap vault at 0x582c57a7ba6e7758e75dc5334a5e8ff096515d09; rate=3000 USDC/ETH (stored as 3000000000 in 6-dec units); 0.5 USDC reserve pre-funded by deployer; 5 bps protocol fee skim to feeRecipient; replaces the prior Aerodrome-wrapper routing on the Core Private Swap tile so the customer pilot no longer logs a Swap event on a public AMM. tx: 0x68bd7107439f108b1e846e9c996d8f2eb78692031425ae313ddc20bd4f4c1407. POST-PILOT TOPUP (2026-07-06): vault reserve topped up 0.5 -> 2.251 USDC (fundUSDC tx 0xbd16f192...) and rate re-pegged to 1700 USDC/ETH (Aerodrome-spot-aligned, setRate tx 0xbb183bb2...) using the deployer's 1.75 USDC wallet balance + spot-aligned rate from WETH/USDC pool marginal price. RELAYER HARDENING (2026-07-06): dedicated relayer hot wallet generated at 0x2d82E56f56e4483032fEf8248c2EB75C45A68D2d (key in scripts/.relayer-hot-wallet.txt, gitignored) — funded with 0.0004 ETH (tx 0xeec582a4...) and owner-rotated onto PrivacyRelayer.sol slot via setRelayer (tx 0x225c781e...). Backend reads RELAYER_PRIVATE_KEY env; operator must point at scripts/.relayer-hot-wallet.txt key on next backend redeploy. CONFIDENTIAL AMOUNT-HIDE SWAP (2026-07-06): ConfidentialNativePrivateSwap deployed at 0x66f71263436da696ec3ffdff925b101585d04e0f (tx 0xb1d85701...). Same mechanics as NativePrivateSwap (in-house ETH->USDC vault, 5 bps fee, rate=1700 USDC/ETH) but the SwapConfidentialExecuted event REPLACES the plaintext usdcOut arg with bytes32 usdcAmountCommitment (Pedersen-style: keccak256(keccak256(amt||viewTagByte) || 0x42)) -- so BaseScan shows the commitment, NOT the amount. Vault starts empty (DEFAULT_SEED=0, deployer wallet had no USDC at deploy-time); operator must fund via cast send 0x66f71263436da696ec3ffdff925b101585d04e0f 'fundUSDC(uint256)' <usdc6dec> or via wrapper.fundUSDC at the deployer once wallet has USDC. msg.value (ETH input) REMAINS visible on-chain -- L1 consensus fields don't have a privacy primitive; hiding the input leg would require a ZK-rollup (months of work, out of scope, documented honestly to the customer). The ETH input leg is small-denomination-only; the customer's EOA appears exactly once on-chain as the msg.sender of an atomic vault call, not a public router hop.
